headline: MarketBeat Week in Review – 07/06 - 07/10
summary: MarketBeat recaps the week's top stories, covering SK Hynix's debut, AI stock rotation, earnings from D.R. Horton, and analysis of Palantir, Microsoft, Meta, Broadcom, Rivian, ASML, and Circle.

headline: GE Vernova Nuclear: Small Revenue Now But A Big Future
summary: GE Vernova (GEV) leads the nuclear renaissance with BWRX-300 SMR contracts; nuclear revenue could reach $2B/yr from 2026. See more here.
